title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
prompt: Given an integer array `nums` and an integer `k`, return the kth largest element in the array. Note that it is the kth largest element in sorted order, not the kth distinct element.
hints: Maintain a min-heap of size k while scanning; the heap top at the end is the answer.
Quickselect (partition-based) gives O(n) average time, O(n^2) worst.
Sorting is the simplest O(n log n) baseline.
pitfalls: Off-by-one: kth largest at sorted index n-k, not n-k+1.
followups: What if the array is huge and you can only stream it?
